summary: Classes define blueprints with `class`. `__init__(self)` initializes instance attributes. `self` points to the calling instance.
oneLineSummary: Classes bundle state and behavior into reusable instance blueprints.

memoryTricks.trick: Class = Cookie Cutter; Instance = The Cookie.

commonErrors.error: TypeError: method() takes 0 positional arguments but 1 was given
commonErrors.cause: Forgot self parameter in def method_name()

nextTopics.title: Inheritance
nextTopics.whyNext: Learn code reuse using child and parent classes.
